trigger: 高府后院和离谈判时，从犹豫转为坚定支持女儿

appearance_delta.face: 中年儒雅，皱纹渐增，眼角慈祥转为坚定温柔
appearance_delta.body: 中等身材，疲惫但姿态坚定

visual_reference: middle-aged Chinese official in ancient dynasty, kind and resolute paternal face with wrinkles, firm yet loving eyes free of initial hesitation, graying hair in bun, medium build standing supportively in dark casual robes, expression showing strong backing for daughter's divorce, highly detailed, daylight courtyard
